_comment: Sample wiki12 content. Field keys match the document-model field names exactly. Slug + searchText are derived server-side by the WikiContentLifecycleListener, so they are NOT provided here.

pages.Title: Albert Einstein
pages.Body:
# Albert Einstein

Theoretical physicist (1879-1955), known for the theory of **relativity**.
See also [Ulm](page:ulm).

pages.Title: Relativity
pages.Body:
# Relativity

The physics of space and time. Special relativity (1905) and general relativity (1915).

pages.Title: Ulm
pages.Body:
# Ulm

A city in Baden-Wuerttemberg, Germany; birthplace of Albert Einstein.

fields.Description: Physicist. Distinct from the `page:albert_einstein` page - same name, different namespace.

fields.Title: Oppenheimer
fields.Description: 2023 biographical film; touches on early 20th-century physics.

fields.Name: Ulm
fields.Description: City on the Danube; the `location:ulm` entity (distinct from the `page:ulm` page).
